arguments.tagline: Provides a high-performance voice-driven user interface aiming for sub-200ms latency.
core_features: Implements a high-performance custom state manager (CustomStore) for efficient data handling.
Utilizes native Web Speech API (webkitSpeechRecognition) for voice commands, avoiding external libraries for lean and direct browser interaction.
Designed for a voice-driven user interface with a target latency of under 200ms.
